evals.prompt: Поставь мне sub2api в Docker/WSL, чтобы Claude Code ходил через мою Codex подписку, модель gpt-5.6 full power, и проверь /context.
evals.expected_output: Provides Docker/WSL install steps for the Headroom-first compose chain, builds/uses headroom-sub2api:0.31.0 with headroom-ai[proxy,code,relevance,html,spreadsheet,otel,reports,mcp] plus RTK, lean-ctx, TokenSave, ast-grep, difft, scc, and the downstream embedding-server patch in front of sub2api, configures Claude Code ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL to http://127.0.0.1:8787 while keeping sub2api :18081 for admin/diagnostics only, registers the headroom MCP through Docker and removes stale missing host headroom/tokensave MCP entries, persists all service state on host bind mounts under SUB2API_STATE_ROOT rather than Docker named volumes, persists Headroom memory/embeddings via /root/.headroom and warmed model caches via /root/.cache/headroom plus /root/.cache/huggingface, exposes only GPT/Codex plus Alibaba Token Plan names in /v1/models, routes GPT/Codex to OpenAI/Codex OAuth and qwen/glm/deepseek-v4-pro to the Alibaba Token Plan Anthropic-compatible account, uses gpt-5.6-sol for main work, uses qwen3.8-max-preview high for small-fast/compact/subagents, pins Claude Code Opus/Fable/Sonnet/Haiku picker aliases to Qwen high with ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL=qwen3.8-max-preview, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_FABLE_MODEL=qwen3.8-max-preview, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL=qwen3.8-max-preview, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL=qwen3.8-max-preview, display name Qwen 3.8 Max, sets group messages_dispatch_model_config.compact_mapped_model=qwen3.8-max-preview so GPT/Codex compact requests cross-route before provider classification, disables CPU Kompress with HEADROOM_DISABLE_KOMPRESS=1 when Docker GPU proof fails, sets only a soft startup effortLevel=xhigh, clears persistent CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL so /effort remains usable, verifies GPT-5.6 explicit --effort max requests reach usage_logs.reasoning_effort=max, sets CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS=370000 and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=340000 for the Claude Code safe compact profile, and verifies Headroom health/upstream, image bootstrap, Docker inspect Type=bind state mounts, ccr_store.db, embedding-server logs/socket/SocketEmbedderClient, headroom tools doctor/savings/perf, sub2api health, /context, /v1/models count 23 without Claude/Fable provider aliases, Qwen/GLM/DeepSeek usage, and usage logs.

evals.prompt: Claude Code показывает gpt-5.6-sol, но /context все равно 17k/200k. Почини и не путай client target с model window.
evals.expected_output: Explains that Claude Code's displayed denominator is controlled by CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW, while GPT-5.6's configured model window is 1.05M. Sets CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS=370000 and CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=340000 for the current safe compact profile, restarts Claude Code, verifies /context matches the configured client target instead of /200k, and checks logs for real context_length_exceeded before claiming an upstream ceiling.

evals.prompt: Настрой Claude Code picker так, чтобы остались GPT family и Qwen/Alibaba Token Plan, а Opus/Fable/Sonnet были Qwen high.
evals.expected_output: Enables the explicit GPT/Codex plus Alibaba Token Plan models list, leaves GPT/Codex exact mappings on the OpenAI/Codex route, adds Alibaba Token Plan passthrough models such as qwen3.8-max-preview/glm-5.2/deepseek-v4-pro, removes raw opus/sonnet/haiku/fable/claude-* provider aliases from /v1/models, keeps normal model_fallbacks empty, sets require_oauth_only=false for the mixed-provider group, sets Claude Code ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL/ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_FABLE_MODEL/ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL/ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL to qwen3.8-max-preview with display name Qwen 3.8 Max, verifies /v1/models through Headroom returns 23 models with no Claude/Fable provider aliases, verifies a GPT request uses the OpenAI/Codex account, and verifies Qwen/GLM/DeepSeek requests use the Alibaba Token Plan Anthropic-compatible account with no pricing-not-found error.

evals.prompt: Claude Code через sub2api иногда дает пустые ответы и в usage_logs вижу 0/0 tokens. Разбери и почини full power профиль.
evals.expected_output: Checks Claude JSONL plus sub2api usage_logs for stream=true 0/0 ghost streams, keeps MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=8000 as a Claude Code compatibility guard, explains that Codex reasoning is requested by effort=max and GPT-5.6 should reach upstream reasoning.effort=max while legacy models may downgrade to xhigh, and tells the user to restart/fork old Claude sessions.

evals.prompt: Claude Code пишет API Error: 503 Service temporarily unavailable, но sub2api /health живой. Отследи ошибку на прокси.
evals.expected_output: Checks Headroom health/upstream first, then sub2api logs for openai_messages.account_select_failed/no available accounts before status_code=503 or 429, queries ops_error_logs and accounts for upstream status plus rate_limited_at/rate_limit_reset_at/temp_unschedulable_reason, distinguishes quota 429 from transient OAuth 403 and from context-window, ghost-stream, or Headroom routing failures, verifies adaptive OAuth 403 auto-heal when applicable, and recommends waiting for a real reset, reducing fan-out, or adding another valid OpenAI/Codex account instead of only raising concurrency.

evals.prompt: Сделай компактизацию Claude Code через sub2api на qwen3.8-max-preview high: основная модель gpt-5.6-sol, а compact и subagents пусть уходят на Qwen high.
evals.expected_output: Keeps ANTHROPIC_MODEL on gpt-5.6-sol, sets ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL=qwen3.8-max-preview, sets CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL=qwen3.8-max-preview, patches user-level general-purpose/Explore/workflow-subagent/bench-reviewer/bench-triage frontmatter to model qwen3.8-max-preview with effort high, keeps Opus/Fable/Sonnet/Haiku picker aliases on qwen3.8-max-preview, keeps normal message fallbacks empty unless explicitly requested, configures group messages_dispatch_model_config.compact_mapped_model=qwen3.8-max-preview for cross-provider compact reroute before route classification, restarts sub2api when code/config changed, and confirms compact/subagent routing from usage_logs.requested_model/upstream_model/account_id plus reasoning_effort=high.

evals.prompt: Почини Headroom/sub2api persistence так, чтобы я больше не пинал за Docker volumes и чтобы эмбеддинги не терялись.
evals.expected_output: Proactively audits Docker inspect mounts before claiming done, refuses Docker named volumes for state, configures SUB2API_STATE_ROOT host bind mounts for Headroom /root/.headroom, /root/.cache/headroom, /root/.cache/huggingface, sub2api /app/data, Postgres data, and Redis /data, keeps the start-headroom-proxy bootstrap seed path, recreates only affected services, verifies Type=bind for every stateful container, verifies CCR_STORE True with nonzero size after memory traffic, verifies embedding-server SocketEmbedderClient and EMBED_OK, syncs the installed local skill, and commits/pushes repo skill/docs/script changes.

evals.prompt: Мне нужен GPU для Headroom в Docker/WSL. Настрой, сравни с CPU и докажи, что Kompress реально работает на видеокарте.
evals.expected_output: Keeps CPU as the portable default, selects the opt-in gpu image stage and docker-compose.gpu.yml on NVIDIA hosts, installs the pinned official CUDA PyTorch wheel, persists HEADROOM_ACCELERATOR=cuda plus HEADROOM_DOCKER_TARGET=gpu and HEADROOM_KOMPRESS_BACKEND=pytorch, proves non-empty Docker DeviceRequests, torch.cuda.is_available(), the expected device name, and Kompress preload backend pytorch, runs benchmark-headroom-kompress on identical CPU/GPU payloads, compares latency, throughput, compression ratio, and sentinel retention, verifies a real Headroom request and executor health, syncs repo/local skills, and does not claim that GPU alone solves partial-result compression, per-session singleflight, or unsafe oversized fail-open.

evals.prompt: После перезагрузки Sub2API Codex Proxy Stack Autostart падает с Wsl/Service/0x8007274c, хотя контейнеры потом живые. Почини без второго автозапуска.
evals.expected_output: Finds the exact scheduled-task log, normalizes UTF-16/NUL WSL output before classifying it, retries transient Wsl/Service/0x8007274c connection failures on every WSL command within a bounded deadline, preserves the single scheduled-task owner and GPU compose overlay, runs the real Scheduled Task, requires LastTaskResult=0, and rechecks Headroom health, Docker DeviceRequests, and CUDA after the task path.

evals.prompt: RTK способен сильно резать вывод, но Headroom показывает RTK 0 commands / 0 tokens saved. Настрой автоматическое участие в Claude Code и закрепи в skill.
evals.expected_output: Explains that container-only RTK cannot rewrite Claude Code Bash commands executed on Windows, installs pinned RTK on Windows plus WSL, keeps exactly one global PreToolUse(Bash) bridge with MSYS2_ARG_CONV_EXCL so Git Bash cannot corrupt Linux paths, preserves cat/git diff/git show/curl accuracy exclusions and RTK_DISABLED bypass, mounts the host RTK history into Headroom /root/.local/share/rtk, verifies the bridge through Git Bash rather than direct PowerShell-to-WSL, proves a real fresh Claude Code Bash tool call creates a new history.db row and matching host/container gain totals, verifies headroom perf cli_filtering is nonzero, and does not present a manual container benchmark as automatic live savings.

evals.prompt: Claude Code стоит на хостовой Ubuntu в Hyper-V VM, а не в devcontainer. Поставь и проверь RTK именно там.
evals.expected_output: Uses scripts/install-claude-rtk.sh on the native Linux host as the Claude user, pins RTK 0.42.4 under ~/.local/bin, preserves existing settings/env and non-RTK hooks, leaves exactly one absolute PreToolUse(Bash) RTK hook, configures cat/git diff/git show/curl exclusions, distinguishes the host filesystem from devcontainers, restarts or launches a fresh Claude process, and proves automatic participation with Bash stream-json, hook debug modified-input evidence, and an increment in rtk gain rather than only a manual RTK command.

evals.prompt: Один OpenAI OAuth 403 HTML отрубил все окна Claude Code на десять минут: health живой, но везде no available accounts и 503. Сделай автохил без ручного SQL reset.
evals.expected_output: Proves the upstream 403 and account temp_unschedulable state from logs/Postgres, verifies the running fork uses 2s/15s/1m/5m consecutive OAuth cooldowns rather than a fixed ten-minute first-hit block, retries the first /v1/messages OAuth 403 once after 2.25s inside the original request, resets the consecutive counter and clears only the OAuth 403 temp state after successful OpenAI usage, preserves unrelated model/quota limits, runs focused service/handler regression tests, rebuilds and recreates only sub2api, and verifies a live request through Headroom plus the openai_403_autoheal log markers.

evals.prompt: Я сбросил недельный Codex лимит на сайте OpenAI, но Claude Code продолжает получать старый 429 rate-limited until через несколько дней. Почини сам stale lock, без fallback на другую модель.
evals.expected_output: Proves that accounts.extra.model_rate_limits still contains the old quota-origin reset while the user performed an external reset, does not add or change model fallbacks, makes a successful proxy reset-credit clear persisted and scheduler-cached model cooldown state immediately, allows a bounded same-model reprobe one minute after rate_limited_at for external site resets, re-closes the probe window on a fresh real upstream 429, clears the stale entry after a successful fresh Codex snapshot, adds boundary and mutation-killing tests, rebuilds only sub2api, and verifies Claude Code gpt-5.6-sol success with usage_logs.model_mapping_chain gpt-5.6-sol->gpt-5.6-sol plus an empty model_rate_limits object.

evals.prompt: Claude Code в Hyper-V VM 25 минут ретраил Unable to connect to API (ConnectionRefused): WSL получил poweroff уже после успешного logon-autostart. Сделай умный автохил, чтобы это больше не требовало ручного запуска WSL.
evals.expected_output: Proves the outage timeline from the Claude session, Linux journal, Docker start times, Windows portproxy, and Scheduled Task state; distinguishes pre-HTTP ConnectionRefused from Headroom/sub2api/provider errors; keeps one elevated Scheduled Task owner; replaces the logon-only action with a health-first ensure script triggered at logon and every minute; configures at least three one-minute task retries with IgnoreNew; performs no container restart on a healthy check; on failure wakes WSL, restores compose and the dynamic Hyper-V bridge through the canonical start script, verifies same-host and VM health, records recovery_started and recovered events, adds a fail-closed contract test, and proves a controlled WSL/bridge outage recovers without manual intervention.

evals.prompt: Claude Code получил 503, а в sub2api OpenAI account status=error: OPENAI_OAUTH_TOKEN_REFRESH_FAILED refresh_token_reused. Сделай автоматический хил, чтобы без ручного SQL после codex login всё поднималось само.
evals.expected_output: Proves the root cause from Claude JSONL, ops_error_logs, and accounts status/schedulable fields; distinguishes this from Headroom local 429, quota cooldown, context overflow, and upstream 403; configures SUB2API_OPENAI_CODEX_AUTH_FILE=/app/data/codex-auth.json and the self-heal task to copy a validated host %USERPROFILE%\.codex\auth.json into the sub2api host bind mount without printing secrets; implements backend recovery that imports a fresh non-expired auth file on refresh_token_reused/invalid_refresh_token-style failures, clears status=error, clears temp-unschedulable, sets schedulable=true, invalidates stale token cache, retries OpenAI account selection once in the original request, and returns 401 authentication_error instructing codex login when the file is missing/unchanged/expired instead of masking it as 503; covers token refresh, selection retry, no-account classification, compose env, setup, and autostart scripts with focused tests; rebuilds/recreates sub2api and verifies health plus a live Headroom request or truthful 401 if the host auth file is stale.
